issue_title: fix: prevent org dashboard tRPC response transform failures
issue_body_preview:
## Summary
- guard `spaces.getOrgMemberSpaces` against empty membership ids so the query never builds an `inArray(..., [])` filter.
- return only org open spaces when a member has no direct/team space memberships and keep permission derivation behavior intact.
- strip internal `id` from the mapped r
test_description_zh: 以一个没有直接空间或团队空间成员身份的组织成员账号登录，访问组织仪表盘页面，观察页面是否正常加载并展示该成员可见的公开空间列表。
expected_result_zh: 组织仪表盘页面应正常加载，不出现错误或空白页面；对于没有直接/团队空间成员身份的用户，应正确显示组织的公开空间列表，权限派生行为正常，页面数据展示无异常。
